notes: With-skill achieves 100% pass rate across all 3 evals vs 72.5% without skill (+27.5%)
The biggest discriminator is structural conformance: without-skill uses ad-hoc section names and block counts
Without-skill consistently lacks Candidate Solution Directions — the skill enforces presenting options to the user
Without-skill never spawns a synthesis critic — the skill adds independent quality validation
Rejection case: with-skill is cleaner (only rejection file, 53s) vs without-skill (creates analysis.md with rejection content, 109s)
With-skill costs ~14% more tokens on average but delivers 100% template compliance
Content quality is comparable — without-skill preserves findings well but lacks structured decision-making (no options, no critic)
